name: MindReply - API Usage Monitoring Pipeline
description: Real-time API monitoring - tracks calls, latency, errors, sends alerts on thresholds

parameters.query: INSERT INTO api_metrics (endpoint, status_code, latency_ms, user_id, timestamp) VALUES ('={{$json.endpoint}}', {{$json.status}}, {{$json.latency}}, '={{$json.user_id}}', NOW())

parameters.jsCode: const latency = $json.latency; const status = $json.status; const alert = latency > 1000 || status >= 500; return { alert, severity: status >= 500 ? 'critical' : 'warning', message: `${status} response - ${latency}ms latency` };
